---
name: "🚀 Feature Request"
about: "Suggest an idea or new feature for RePen"
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: "enhancement"
assignees: ""
---

> **Looking for the Roadmap?**
> Check out what features we are currently developing and vote on community requests at [rehmanahmad.pro](https://rehmanahmad.pro).

### Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g. "I struggle to do X...")

### Describe the Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. 

### Describe Alternatives You've Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

### Additional Context
Add any other context, mockup designs, or reference screenshots about the feature request here.
